name: Read Lattice Data
description: Reads a value from the user's lattice namespace at the given path. Paths use '/' separators (e.g. 'g/my-agent/state', 'w/my-notes', 'o/my-op'). Namespaces: 'g' = agents, 's' = secrets, 'j' = jobs, 'w' = workspace, 'o' = operations. Path can also be a JSON array for pre-typed keys. Returns {exists: true, value: <data>} when path has data. If the value exceeds maxSize bytes (default 1000000), returns {exists: true, truncated: true, size: <bytes>} — use covia:list to inspect or covia:slice to page through vectors.

path.description: Path to read, e.g. 'g/my-agent/state' or 'w/my-notes'. Namespaces: g = agents, s = secrets, j = jobs, w = workspace, o = operations.

maxSize.description: Maximum memory size in bytes for the returned value (default 1000000). If exceeded, returns truncated: true with the size.

exists.description: True if data exists at this path

value.description: The value at the path, or null if not found or truncated

truncated.description: True if the value was too large and was not returned

size.description: Memory size in bytes (only present when truncated)
